message:
refactor(tests): reformat control lane policy conformance tests and fix borrow-checker issue in workload simulation

- Reformats assert! format strings to use trailing-comma multi-line style
  per rustfmt conventions
- Reformats matches! macro in starvation test for readability
- Fixes workload simulation test: clones task_id from audit_log before
  calling complete_task, avoiding an immutable borrow conflict where
  audit_log() and complete_task() both needed &mut sched
- Adds new control_lane_policy test file under crates/franken-node/tests/

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
